gapRegister.closure: Submit returns the BFF projection only after authoritative promotion, outcome, receipt, tracking, and notification queue truth are read from one result chain.

gapRegister.closure: The gateway composes the command API confirmation outbox with the notification worker and preserves local acknowledgement, transport settlement, and delivery evidence as separate patient truth states.

gapRegister.verification: The endpoint matrix and validator require the shared envelope family across receipt and tracking rows.

gapRegister.closure: The BFF keys projections by a collision-resistant requestPublicId, exact replay returns the prior settlement, and stale promoted draft recovery remains read-only in the same shell.
gapRegister.verification: The validator rejects base64-prefix request IDs and duplicate visible success states.
